releaseNotes: v0.28.4 — Security & data-integrity hardening; no customer-facing feature changes. (1) No-PHI protection: free-text notes (the quarantine reason and the split-container note) are now screened for accidental patient references the same way the actor field already was. RxRescue stays stock-only by design — describe the stock or its condition, not a person. Screening runs in the app, on backup restore, and on the sync server. (2) Multi-device sync: hardened the client/server contract gate so an edit field the app can apply but the server doesn't recognize is caught at build time (closes a latent case that could have stalled sync), and a malformed error response from a network proxy no longer causes an operation to retry forever. 567 tests passing.
